page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Finding Optimizing and Reporting Cas Targets (FORCAST) pipeline enables researchers to design Cas-mediated mutagenesis experiments in model organisms with ease. It is a fully integrated and open source pipeline to design Cas-mediated mutagenesis experiments.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The Finding Optimizing and Reporting Cas Targets (FORCAST) pipeline enables researchers to design Cas-mediated mutagenesis experiments in model organisms with ease. It is a fully integrated and open source pipeline to design Cas-mediated mutagenesis experiments.
